testcases.input: fruits = [1,2,1] Output: 3 Explanation: We can pick from all 3 trees.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: We can pick from all 3 trees.

testcases.input: fruits = [0,1,2,2] Output: 3 Explanation: We can pick from trees [1,2,2]. If we had started at the first tree, we would only pick from trees [0,1].
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: We can pick from trees [1,2,2]. If we had started at the first tree, we would only pick from trees [0,1].

testcases.input: fruits = [1,2,3,2,2] Output: 4 Explanation: We can pick from trees [2,3,2,2]. If we had started at the first tree, we would only pick from trees [1,2].
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: We can pick from trees [2,3,2,2]. If we had started at the first tree, we would only pick from trees [1,2].
